cells.rationale: Security-critical bypass-resistant Bash allowlist guard with fail-closed envelope semantics and adversarial command tokenization — a subtle security invariant where any parsing gap is a live bypass.
Mechanical two-surface category addition plus a template re-point and re-render against existing drift gates, with named patterns to mirror.

Contract-touching ref/parse/brief plumbing across leaf modules with byte-identical preservation, but it mirrors existing incident-builder and verb-union shapes so no intelligence-bound reason clears the opus bar.

Re-fold-deterministic fingerprint fold, synthetic-event sticky latch, schema bump, and positive-evidence/page-once semantics wired into the daemon sweep — subtle event-sourcing correctness invariants with replay-bomb risk.
Prose-only skill authoring cloned from the deconflict precedent plus sibling hardening lines, requiring cross-check against the guard allowlist but no novel design.
Prune-first documentation and glossary edits in existing styles, with care needed for a dense revise-in-place paragraph and a lint gate.
